Defense & Public Safety

TWO
MISSIONS.

One Physical AI platform powering both national defense and public safety — from autonomous intercept to disaster first response.

Explore Our Products →
What We Do
Vertical 01 · Public Safety
Disaster Response
Autonomous Agents

Autonomous drone agents for wildfire detection, landslide monitoring, and disaster response — on-scene before human responders, in environments too dangerous for people.

Partners: Fire departments, forestry services, police, local governments.

Wildfire Detection DFR Search & Rescue Disaster Response
Vertical 02 · National Defense
Low-Altitude
Air Defense

New-generation low-altitude air defense protecting Korea's critical infrastructure — energy, nuclear, power — from drone threats. Sensor fusion C2 with autonomous intercept.

Customers: Korean military, defense agencies, critical infrastructure operators.

Counter-UAS Critical Infrastructure Sensor Fusion C2 Autonomous Intercept
Use Cases

Real problems.
Deployed.

Not prototypes. Deployed systems with validated field performance protecting lives and national infrastructure.

Public Safety
Wildfire Early Detection

SOMA deploys autonomously on fire detection — thermal imaging, fire line mapping, aerial command before ground crews arrive.

Scenario
"AI CCTV detects smoke → SOMA airborne <20sec → on-scene 5min → fire line to joint command."
Public Safety
Landslide & Flood Monitoring

IoT soil sensors fused with drone data. Identifies pre-collapse signatures and dispatches reconnaissance before disaster strikes.

Scenario
"Soil sensors exceed threshold → drone dispatched → micro-fractures identified → evacuation alert before collapse."
Public Safety
Search & Rescue

AI object detection, thermal imaging, loudspeaker capability in areas inaccessible to ground teams.

Scenario
"Missing person in mountain terrain → SOMA thermal → target located → coordinates to ground teams real time."
Defense
Critical Infrastructure Protection

24/7 autonomous detection, classification, and intercept — sensor fusion across radar, EO/IR, and RF.

Scenario
"Unknown drone enters airspace → AI classifies → intercept auto-launched → neutralized before reaching facility."
Defense
Border & Perimeter Surveillance

Multi-drone swarm coordination. AI anomaly detection replacing costly manual patrols with always-on autonomous coverage.

Scenario
"6-drone swarm covers 50km² → anomaly detected → intercept redirected within 60 seconds."
Defense
Multi-Domain C2

UAV, UGV, and USV under one operational picture — multi-domain autonomous operations with AI-assisted decision support.

Scenario
"Multi-domain response → drones ISR → ground robots advance → USV secures flank → single C2 dashboard."
Platform

Full-stack
Physical AI.

The C2 OS at the center — receiving sensor data from any hardware, running AI decision logic, issuing commands to any robot in the field. Hardware-agnostic. Mission-configurable.

Domain Expansion

Air. Ground. Sea.

Domain-agnostic by design. Begin in the air, systematically expand across all operational domains.

Phase 01 · Now
Aerial (UAV)

Saerier, Saena, SOMA deployed. ₩2.8B first-year revenue. $12M seed closed. Government contracts active.

Phase 02 · Next
Ground (UGV)

Autonomous ground vehicles for perimeter patrol, logistics, combat engineering. Same C2 OS.

Phase 03 · Future
Maritime (USV)

Unmanned surface vehicles for coastal defense and port security. Korea's shipbuilding meets Physical AI.
